◆ FDYN_GATHER

#define FDYN_GATHER (   vec,
  bx,
  by,
  bz 
)
Value:
do { \
const PetscReal *_a; \
PetscMemzero((bx), nv * sizeof(PetscReal)); \
PetscMemzero((by), nv * sizeof(PetscReal)); \
PetscMemzero((bz), nv * sizeof(PetscReal)); \
VecGetArrayRead((vec), &_a); \
{ \
PetscInt oi = 0; \
for (PetscInt lv = 0; lv < gctx->nLocalVerts; ++lv) { \
PetscInt v = gctx->origVert[lv]; \
if (v < 0 || v >= nv || gctx->ownerRank[v] != myrank) continue; \
(bx)[v] = _a[oi*dof ]; \
(by)[v] = _a[oi*dof+1]; \
(bz)[v] = _a[oi*dof+2]; \
oi++; \
} \
} \
VecRestoreArrayRead((vec), &_a); \
MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, (bx), nv, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD); \
MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, (by), nv, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD); \
MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, (bz), nv, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD); \
} while (0)

◆ FormFunctionFEM()

PetscErrorCode FormFunctionFEM ( SNES  snes,
Vec  x,
Vec  R,
void *  ctx 
)

Definition at line 694 of file main.c.

694 {
695
696 FE *fem=(FE *)ctx;
697 IBMNodes *ibm=fem->ibm;
698 Mat Jmat = NULL;
699 PetscErrorCode ierr;
700 const PetscReal *xx;
701 PetscReal *RR, *RRes,*FF;
702 PetscInt nv, ec;
703 //---------Update the location
704 {
705 DMPlexGeomCtx *gctx = &fem->geom_ctx;
706 ierr = VecGetArrayRead(x, &xx); CHKERRQ(ierr);
707 if (gctx->initialized) {
708 /* Parallel path: each rank updates its owned vertices, then Allreduce gives
709 * all ranks the complete ibm->x_bp[0..n_v-1]. */
710 PetscMPIInt fmyrank;
711 MPI_Comm_rank(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, &fmyrank);
712 PetscMemzero(ibm->x_bp, ibm->n_v * sizeof(PetscReal));
713 PetscMemzero(ibm->y_bp, ibm->n_v * sizeof(PetscReal));
714 PetscMemzero(ibm->z_bp, ibm->n_v * sizeof(PetscReal));
715 {
716 PetscInt oi = 0;
717 for (PetscInt lv = 0; lv < gctx->nLocalVerts; ++lv) {
718 PetscInt v = gctx->origVert[lv];
719 if (v < 0 || v >= ibm->n_v || gctx->ownerRank[v] != fmyrank) continue;
720 ibm->x_bp[v] = xx[oi*dof ];
721 ibm->y_bp[v] = xx[oi*dof+1];
722 ibm->z_bp[v] = xx[oi*dof+2];
723 if (twod) ibm->z_bp[v] = ibm->z_bp0[v];
724 oi++;
725 }
726 }
727 ierr = VecRestoreArrayRead(x, &xx); CHKERRQ(ierr);
728 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, ibm->x_bp, ibm->n_v, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD);
729 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, ibm->y_bp, ibm->n_v, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD);
730 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, ibm->z_bp, ibm->n_v, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD);
731 } else {
732 /* Serial path: Vec covers all nodes including ghost stencil nodes. */
733 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v + ibm->n_ghosts; nv++) {
734 ibm->x_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof ];
735 ibm->y_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof+1];
736 ibm->z_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof+2];
737 if(twod){ibm->z_bp[nv] = ibm->z_bp0[nv];}
738 }
739 ierr = VecRestoreArrayRead(x, &xx); CHKERRQ(ierr);
740 }
741 }
742
743 VecCopy(x, fem->x);
744
745 //for displacement BCs
746 //MoveBoundary(3, fem);
747 //
748
749 AreaNormal(ibm);
750 if (bending){
751 if (curvature==1) {
752 PatchLoc(ibm);
753 GhostLoc(fem);
754 } else if (curvature==6) {
755 // EdgeDirectionalFix(0, 1, fem, R);
756 // EdgeDirectionalFix(3, 0, fem, R);
757 // EdgeFreeR(fem, R);
758 GlobalGhost(ibm);
759 GhostDirectionalFix(ibm, 0, 1);
760 GhostDirectionalFix(ibm, 3, 0);
761 }
762 }
763
764 //---------Compute Forces then Residual
765 VecSet(fem->Fext, 0.0); VecSet(fem->Fint, 0.0); VecSet(fem->Fdyn, 0.0);
766 VecSet(R, 0.0); VecSet(fem->FJ, 0.0);
767 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++) fem->IE[nv] = 0.;
768 for (ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++) fem->FC[ec] = 0.;
769
770 if (muscle_activation){
771 ierr = FInternalAct(fem); CHKERRQ(ierr);
772 }
773 else{
774 FInternal(fem);
775 }
776
777 if(tisteps>1) {FDynamic(fem);}
778 ierr = FExternal(fem); CHKERRQ(ierr);
779
780 VecWAXPY(R,-1., fem->Fext, fem->Fint);
781 VecAXPY(R,1., fem->Fdyn);
782
783 //---------2d case
784 // if(twod){
785 // VecGetArray(fem->x, &xx);
786 // VecGetArray(R, &RR);
787 // for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++) {
788 // xx[nv*dof+2]=ibm->z_bp0[nv];
789 // RR[nv*dof+2]=0.0;
790 // }
791 // VecRestoreArray(R, &RR);
792 // VecRestoreArray(fem->x, &xx);
793 // }
794
795 /* Apex ring (edge_n=0) is no longer pinned — the apex cap now spans the
796 * hole with real elements, so fully fixing the ring would over-constrain
797 * it. Only the 3 apex-cap center nodes stay fixed.
798 ierr = EdgeDirectionalFix(0, 0, fem, R); CHKERRQ(ierr);
799 ierr = EdgeDirectionalFix(0, 1, fem, R); CHKERRQ(ierr);
800 ierr = EdgeDirectionalFix(0, 2, fem, R); CHKERRQ(ierr); */
801 /* Fix the 3 apex-cap center nodes (edge_n=2, see lv_geometry.c). No-op
802 * (n_bnodes[2]=0) for any mesh type that doesn't populate this group. */
803 ierr = EdgeDirectionalFix(2, 0, fem, R); CHKERRQ(ierr);
804 ierr = EdgeDirectionalFix(2, 1, fem, R); CHKERRQ(ierr);
805 ierr = EdgeDirectionalFix(2, 2, fem, R); CHKERRQ(ierr);
806 ierr = EdgeFreeR(fem, R); CHKERRQ(ierr); /* no-op for LV (n_ghosts=0) */
807
808 // GlobalGhost(ibm);
809
810 PetscReal fext_inf = 0.0, scale = 1.0;
811 ierr = VecNorm(fem->Fext, NORM_INFINITY, &fext_inf); CHKERRQ(ierr);
812
813 /* Avoid dividing by ~0 when load is tiny */
814 scale = 1.0 / PetscMax(fext_inf, 1.0); /* choose 1.0 as floor (units) */
815
816 ierr = VecScale(R, scale); CHKERRQ(ierr);
817
818 //for displacement BCs
819 //
820
821 return(0);
822}

350 if (ressmooth) {
351 VecDuplicate(fem->Res, &fem->Res_smth);
352 VecSet(fem->Res_smth, 0.0);
353 }
354

Definition at line 246 of file external.c.

246 {
247
248 IBMNodes *ibm = fem->ibm;
249 DMPlexGeomCtx *gctx = &fem->geom_ctx;
250 PetscReal *xdd;
251 PetscInt nb;
252 PetscInt start=0, end=0, edge, nbc;
253
254 VecGetArray(fem->xd, &xdd);
255
256 for (edge=0; edge<edge_n+1; edge++) {
257 end += ibm->n_bnodes[edge];
258 }
259 start = end - ibm->n_bnodes[edge_n];
260
261 for (nbc=start; nbc<end; nbc++) { //fix boundary nodes
262 nb = ibm->bnodes[nbc];
263 PetscInt local_idx = gctx->initialized ? gctx->ibm_to_local_idx[nb] : nb;
264 if (local_idx < 0) continue;
265 xdd[local_idx*dof] = 0.0;
266 }
267
268 VecRestoreArray(fem->xd, &xdd);
269
270 return(0);
271}

221 ibm->El[0][ec] = initial_elasticity_value;
222 ibm->E_epsilon[0][ec] = 0.0;
223 ibm->El[1][ec] = initial_poisson;
224 ibm->E_epsilon[1][ec] = 0.0;
225 }
226
227 return(0);
228}

◆ ResidualCalc()

PetscErrorCode ResidualCalc ( int  ibi,
FE *  fem 
)
extern

Definition at line 75 of file inverse.c.

75 {
76
77 /*
78 Description:
79 Compute residual based on last given nodal coordinates, external forces, and BCs.
80
81 Usage:
82 updateFung, update_elasticity
83
84 Note:
85 Check the "GlobalGhost(ibm);" call is required or not (based on BCs)
86 */
87
88 // We have to take x_n+1 and x_n from last saved iteration to calculate the strains
89 IBMNodes *ibm=fem->ibm;
90 PetscInt nv, ec;
91 PetscReal *xx;
92 //---------Update the location
93 VecGetArray(fem->x, &xx);
94 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v + ibm->n_ghosts; nv++) {
95 ibm->x_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof ];
96 ibm->y_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof+1];
97 ibm->z_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof+2];
98 if(twod){ibm->z_bp[nv] = ibm->z_bp0[nv];} //2d case
99 // /* } */
100 }
101 VecRestoreArray(fem->x, &xx);
102
103 AreaNormal(ibm);
104 if (bending){
105 if (curvature==1) {
106 PatchLoc(ibm);
107 GhostLoc(fem);
108 } else if (curvature==6) {
109 GlobalGhost(ibm);
110 }
111 }
112 VecSet(fem->Fext, 0.0); VecSet(fem->Fint, 0.0); VecSet(fem->Fdyn, 0.0);
113 VecSet(fem->Res, 0.0); VecSet(fem->FJ, 0.0);
114 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++) fem->IE[nv] = 0.;
115 for (ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++) fem->FC[ec] = 0.;
116
117
118 FInternal(fem);
119 if(tisteps>1) {FDynamic(fem);}
120 FExternal(fem);
121
122 VecWAXPY(fem->Res,-1., fem->Fext, fem->Fint);
123 VecAXPY(fem->Res,1., fem->Fdyn);
124 return(0);
125
126}

PetscErrorCode updateFung ( PetscReal *  learning_rate,
PetscInt  epoch,
FE *  fem 
)
extern

611 {
612
613 PetscInt nv, ec, k, m;
614 IBMNodes *ibm=fem->ibm;
615 PetscScalar *RRes;
616 PetscReal initial_learning_rate = learning_rate[7];
617 PetscReal min_learning_rate = 1e-4;
618 // PetscReal decay_rate = 0.001;
619
620 VecGetArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
621
622 for (ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++){
623 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++){
624 for (k=0; k<dof; k++){
625 for (m=0; m<n_Fung_Coeffs-1; m++){
626 double lr = learning_rate[m];
627 if (m == 7) {
628 lr = fmax(min_learning_rate, initial_learning_rate * exp(-decay_factor * epoch));
629 lr = initial_learning_rate * exp(-decay_factor * epoch);
630 }
631 ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] = ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] - 2*lr*RRes[nv*dof+k]*(fem->Jac_Fung[nv][ec][k][m]);
632 if (m == 7 && ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] > 1.0) {
633 ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] = 1.0;
634 }
635 /*
636 if (m == 7 && ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] < 0.0) {
637 ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] = 0.0;
638 }
639 */
640 }
641 }
642 }
643 }
644 VecRestoreArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
645
646 return(0);
647}

◆ updateFungAdam()

PetscErrorCode updateFungAdam ( PetscReal *  learning_rate,
FE *  fem,
PetscInt  time_step 
)
extern

Definition at line 650 of file inverse.c.

650 {
651 PetscInt ec, k, m, nv;
652 IBMNodes *ibm = fem->ibm;
653 PetscScalar *RRes;
654 PetscReal beta1 = 0.9, beta2 = 0.999, epsilon = 1e-8;
655 // PetscReal decay_rate = 0.1;
656
657 // Temporary variables for Adam optimizer estimates
658 PetscReal m_estimate, v_estimate, m_hat, v_hat, g;
659
660 VecGetArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
661
662 for (ec = 0; ec < ibm->n_elmt; ec++) {
663 for (m = 0; m < n_Fung_Coeffs ; m++) {
664
665 if (time_step == 0){
666 ibm->Adam_mestimate[m][ec] = 0.0;
667 ibm->Adam_vestimate[m][ec] = 0.0;
668 }
669 m_estimate = ibm->Adam_mestimate[m][ec];
670 v_estimate = ibm->Adam_vestimate[m][ec];
671 g = 0.0;
672
673 // Accumulate gradients over nv and k
674 for (nv = 0; nv < ibm->n_v; nv++) {
675 for (k = 0; k < dof; k++) {
676 // PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "RRes[nv * dof + k] = %f, abs(RRes[nv * dof + k]) = %f\n", RRes[nv * dof + k],);
677 g += RRes[nv * dof + k] * fem->Jac_Fung[nv][ec][k][m];
678 // g += RRes[nv * dof + k] / l(PetscAbsReal(RRes[nv * dof + k])+ epsion ) / ((PetscAbsReal(fem->Jac_Fung[nv][ec][k][m]) + epsilon )) * fem->Jac_Fung[nv][ec][k][m];
679 }
680 }
681
682 if (g==0){
683// printf("g is zero!\n");
684 continue;
685 }
686 //PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "ec=%d, m=%d, g=%f\n", ec, m, g);
687
688 // Compute m_estimate and v_estimate using accumulated gradient
689 m_estimate = beta1 * m_estimate + (1 - beta1) * g;
690 v_estimate = beta2 * v_estimate + (1 - beta2) * g * g;
691
692 ibm->Adam_mestimate[m][ec] = m_estimate;
693 ibm->Adam_vestimate[m][ec] = v_estimate;
694
695 //PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "m_estimate (before correction) = %f, v_estimate (before correction) = %f\n", m_estimate, v_estimate);
696 // Correct bias for m and v estimates
697 m_hat = m_estimate / (1 - pow(beta1, time_step+1));
698 v_hat = v_estimate / (1 - pow(beta2, time_step+1));
699 //PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "m_hat = %f, v_hat = %f\n", m_hat, v_hat);
700 // Update the coefficient
701 double lr = learning_rate[m]/(1 + decay_factor * time_step);
702 ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] -= lr * m_hat / (sqrt(v_hat) + epsilon);
703 double pi = 3.141592;
704 if (m == 7) {
705 if (ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] < 0.0){
706 ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] = 0.0;
707 }
708 if (ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] > 1.0){
709 ibm->Fung_coeffs[m][ec] = 1.0;
710 }
711 }
712
713 /*
714 if (fabs(grad[i]) > grad_clip_threshold) {
715 grad[i] = copysign(grad_clip_threshold, grad[i]);
716 }
717 */
718
719
720 }
721
722 }
723
724 VecRestoreArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
725 return (0);
726}

◆ FungJacobian()

PetscErrorCode FungJacobian ( PetscInt  ibi,
FE *  fem,
PetscReal  epsilon 
)
extern

Definition at line 346 of file inverse.c.

346 {
347 /*
348 Compute Jacobian dR_k^i/dc_m^j // Jac_Fung[i][j][k][m]
349 i : node index
350 j : element index
351 k : dof index
352 m : Fung's model coeff index (0-6) (c, A_i) (membrane only)
353
354 Usage:
355 updateFung
356 */
357 IBMNodes *ibm=fem->ibm;
358 PetscInt nv, ec;
359 PetscScalar *RRes;
360
361 PetscReal **residual_array_plus;
362 PetscMalloc(ibm->n_v * sizeof(PetscReal*), &residual_array_plus);
363 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; i++) {
364 PetscMalloc(dof * sizeof(PetscReal), &residual_array_plus[i]);
365 }
366 PetscReal **residual_array_minus;
367 PetscMalloc(ibm->n_v * sizeof(PetscReal*), &residual_array_minus);
368 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; i++) {
369 PetscMalloc(dof * sizeof(PetscReal), &residual_array_minus[i]);
370 }
371 // PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "a r malloc\n");
372
373 for (int m = 0; m < n_Fung_Coeffs-2; m++){
374 for(ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++){
375
376 update_Fung_epsilon(ec, m, 1.0, epsilon, fem);
377 ResidualCalc(ibi, fem);
378 VecGetArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
379 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; ++i) {
380 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
381 residual_array_plus[i][k] = RRes[i*dof+k];
382 }
383 }
384 VecRestoreArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
385
386 update_Fung_epsilon(ec, m, -1.0, epsilon, fem);
387 ResidualCalc(ibi, fem);
388 VecGetArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
389 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; ++i) {
390 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
391 residual_array_minus[i][k] = RRes[i*dof+k];
392 }
393 }
394 VecRestoreArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
395
396 for(nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++){
397 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
398 fem->Jac_Fung[nv][ec][k][m] = (residual_array_plus[nv][k] - residual_array_minus[nv][k])/(2*epsilon);
399 if (isnan(fem->Jac_Fung[nv][ec][k][m])) {
400 // printf("NaN detected at ibi=%d, node=%d, dof=%d\n", ibi, i, j);
401 // exit(1); // Stop execution for debugging
402 }
403 }
404 }
405 }
406 }
407
408
409 reset_Fung_epsilon(fem);
410
411 if (uniform_fiber_dir){
412 for (int m = n_Fung_Coeffs-2; m < n_Fung_Coeffs - 1; m++){
413 for(ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++){
414 ibm->Fung_epsilons[m][ec] = epsilon;
415 }
416
417 ResidualCalc(ibi, fem);
418 VecGetArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
419 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; ++i) {
420 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
421 residual_array_plus[i][k] = RRes[i*dof+k];
422 }
423 }
424 VecRestoreArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
425
426
427 for(ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++){
428 ibm->Fung_epsilons[m][ec] = -epsilon;
429 }
430
431 ResidualCalc(ibi, fem);
432 VecGetArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
433 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; ++i) {
434 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
435 residual_array_minus[i][k] = RRes[i*dof+k];
436 }
437 }
438 VecRestoreArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
439
440 for(ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++){
441 for(nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++){
442 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
443 fem->Jac_Fung[nv][ec][k][m] = (residual_array_plus[nv][k] - residual_array_minus[nv][k])/(2*epsilon);
444
445 }
446 }
447 }
448 }
449 }
450 else{
451 for (int m = n_Fung_Coeffs-2; m < n_Fung_Coeffs-1; m++){
452 for(ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++){
453
454 update_Fung_epsilon(ec, m, 1.0, epsilon, fem);
455
456 ResidualCalc(ibi, fem);
457
458 VecGetArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
459 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; ++i) {
460 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
461 residual_array_plus[i][k] = RRes[i*dof+k];
462 }
463 }
464 VecRestoreArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
465
466 update_Fung_epsilon(ec, m, -1.0, epsilon, fem);
467 ResidualCalc(ibi, fem);
468
469 VecGetArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
470 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; ++i) {
471 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
472 residual_array_minus[i][k] = RRes[i*dof+k];
473 }
474 }
475 VecRestoreArray(fem->Res, &RRes);
476
477 for(nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++){
478 for (int k = 0; k < dof; k++){
479 fem->Jac_Fung[nv][ec][k][m] = (residual_array_plus[nv][k] - residual_array_minus[nv][k])/(2*epsilon);
480 }
481 }
482 }
483 }
484 }
485
486 reset_Fung_epsilon(fem);
487
488 free(residual_array_plus);
489 free(residual_array_minus);
490
491 return(0);
492}

◆ IrrVer()

PetscErrorCode IrrVer ( IBMNodes *  ibm)
extern

Definition at line 1188 of file bending.c.

1188 {
1189
1190 PetscInt nc, ec, count, i, bcount, *irr, *elmt;
1191
1192 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "[IrrVer] enter n_elmt=%d n_v=%d sum_n_bnodes=%d\n",
1193 (int)ibm->n_elmt, (int)ibm->n_v, (int)ibm->sum_n_bnodes);
1194
1195 PetscMalloc(ibm->n_v*sizeof(PetscInt), &irr); //saves irregular node
1196 PetscMalloc1(ibm->n_elmt, &elmt);
1197
1198 for (ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++) {
1199 ibm->ire[ec] = 0;
1200 ibm->irv[ec] = 0;
1201 ibm->val[ec] = 6;
1202 }
1203
1204 /* Count only base elements (ec < n_elmt_base) when classifying vertices.
1205 Cap fan elements (ec >= n_elmt_base) use a CST fallback in active_strain.c
1206 and must not be counted here:
1207 - The apex node appears in all N_phi fan elements; counting them gives
1208 val = N_phi >> 16, which overflows ibm->patch[] in Patch().
1209 - Ring-0 boundary nodes appear in 3 base elements → bcount = 6 → REGULAR. */
1210 PetscInt ec_limit = (ibm->n_elmt_base > 0) ? ibm->n_elmt_base : ibm->n_elmt;
1211 for (nc=0; nc<ibm->n_v; nc++) {
1212 irr[nc] = 0;
1213 count = 0;
1214 bcount = 0;
1215
1216 /* Determine whether this node is a boundary node */
1217 PetscInt is_bnode = 0;
1218 for (i=0; i<ibm->sum_n_bnodes; i++) {
1219 if (nc==ibm->bnodes[i]) { is_bnode = 1; break; }
1220 }
1221
1222 for (ec=0; ec<ec_limit; ec++) {
1223 if (nc==ibm->nv1[ec] || nc==ibm->nv2[ec] || nc==ibm->nv3[ec]) {
1224 elmt[count] = ec;
1225 count++;
1226 }
1227 }
1228
1229 if (is_bnode) {
1230 bcount = count + 3;
1231 }
1232
1233 if (bcount==0) {
1234 if (count!=6) {
1235 irr[nc] = 1;
1236 for (i=0; i<count; i++) {
1237 ibm->ire[elmt[i]] = 1;
1238 ibm->val[elmt[i]] = count;
1239 }
1240 }
1241 } else {
1242 if (bcount!=6) {
1243 irr[nc] = 1;
1244 for (i=0; i<count; i++) {
1245 ibm->ire[elmt[i]] = 1;
1246 ibm->val[elmt[i]] = bcount;
1247 }
1248 }
1249 }
1250 }
1251
1252 for (ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++) { //detects which element vertex is irregular
1253 for (nc=0; nc<ibm->n_v; nc++) {
1254 if (irr[nc]==1) {
1255 if (nc==ibm->nv1[ec]) {ibm->irv[ec] = 1;}
1256 if (nc==ibm->nv2[ec]) {ibm->irv[ec] = 2;}
1257 if (nc==ibm->nv3[ec]) {ibm->irv[ec] = 3;}
1258 }
1259 }
1260 }
1261
1262 PetscFree(irr);
1263 PetscFree(elmt);
1264 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "[IrrVer] done\n");

1266 return(0);

1286 /* ElemUpdFint()'s CST fallback (active_strain.c) searches patch[] for
1287 * nv1/nv2/nv3 within [0, val[ec]+6) slots — place them at the same
1288 * slot positions (3,6,7) the regular-patch case below uses so that
1289 * lookup succeeds for cap elements too. */

◆ main()

int main ( int  argc,
char **  argv 
)

Definition at line 126 of file main.c.

127{
128 /* Pass "control.dat" as the options file so PETSc loads it BEFORE argv.
129 * PetscInitialize order: file → PETSC_OPTIONS env → argv (command line).
130 * This means command-line flags override control.dat, not the other way round. */
131 PetscInitialize(&argc, &argv, "control.dat", help);
132
133 /* Also load control.dat from -in_dir if provided (e.g. when running from a
134 * different directory). These are inserted AFTER argv so in_dir file wins
135 * over the cwd control.dat but still loses to explicit command-line flags. */
136 PetscOptionsGetString(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-in_dir", in_dir, 255, PETSC_NULL);
137 if (in_dir[0] != '\0') {
138 char control_path[512];
139 snprintf(control_path, sizeof(control_path), "%s/%s", in_dir, "control.dat");
140 if (access(control_path, F_OK) == 0) {
141 PetscOptionsInsertFile(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, PETSC_NULL, control_path, PETSC_TRUE);
142 }
143 }
144
145 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-nbody", &nbody, PETSC_NULL);
146 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-E", &E, PETSC_NULL);
147 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-mu", &mu, PETSC_NULL);
148 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-rho", &rho, PETSC_NULL);
149 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-h0", &h0, PETSC_NULL);
150 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-char_length_x", &char_length_x, PETSC_NULL);
151 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-char_length_y", &char_length_y, PETSC_NULL);
152 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-char_length_z", &char_length_z, PETSC_NULL);
153 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-tisteps", &tisteps, PETSC_NULL);
154 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-tistart", &tistart, PETSC_NULL);
155 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-dt", &dt, PETSC_NULL);
156 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-timeinteg", &timeinteg, PETSC_NULL);
157 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-explicit", &explicit, PETSC_NULL);
158 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-damping", &damping, PETSC_NULL);
159 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-dampfactor", &dampfactor, PETSC_NULL);
160 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-tiout", &tiout, PETSC_NULL);
161 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-twod", &twod, PETSC_NULL);
162 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-membrane", &membrane, PETSC_NULL);
163 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-bending", &bending, PETSC_NULL);
164 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-contact", &contact, PETSC_NULL);
165 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-ConstitutiveLawNonLinear", &ConstitutiveLawNonLinear, PETSC_NULL);
166 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-outghost", &outghost, PETSC_NULL);
167 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-curvature", &curvature, PETSC_NULL);
168 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-manufactured", &manufactured, PETSC_NULL);
169 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-inverse", &inverse, PETSC_NULL);
170 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-fibersmooth", &fibersmooth, PETSC_NULL);
171 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-ressmooth", &ressmooth, PETSC_NULL);
172 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-res_smooth_itrs", &res_smooth_itrs, PETSC_NULL);
173 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-n_epochs", &n_epochs, PETSC_NULL);
174 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-init_flag", &init_flag, PETSC_NULL);
175 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-epoch_start", &epoch_start, PETSC_NULL);
176 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-learning_rate", &learning_rate, PETSC_NULL);
177 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-fib_smth_factor", &fib_smth_factor, PETSC_NULL);
178 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-initial_elas", &initial_elas, PETSC_NULL);
179 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-initial_poisson", &initial_poisson, PETSC_NULL);
180 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-patience", &patience, PETSC_NULL);
181 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-decay_factor", &decay_factor, PETSC_NULL);
182 PetscOptionsGetReal(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-improvement_threshold", &improvement_threshold, PETSC_NULL);
183 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-epoch_output", &epoch_output, PETSC_NULL);
184 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-Adam", &Adam, PETSC_NULL);
185 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-constrained_el", &constrained_el, PETSC_NULL);
186 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-uniform_fung", &uniform_fung, PETSC_NULL);
187 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-uniform_fiber_dir", &uniform_fiber_dir, PETSC_NULL);
188 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-epoch_update_jacobian", &epoch_update_jacobian, PETSC_NULL);
189 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-par_jac", &par_jac, PETSC_NULL);
190 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-progress_bar_show", &progress_bar_show, PETSC_NULL);
191
192 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-muscle_activation", &muscle_activation, PETSC_NULL);
193 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-cuda_process", &cuda_process, PETSC_NULL);
194 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-kokkos_process", &kokkos_process, PETSC_NULL);
195 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-dmplex_geom_process", &dmplex_geom_process, PETSC_NULL);
196 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-lv_geom_process", &lv_geom_process, PETSC_NULL);
197 PetscOptionsGetInt(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-monitor_residual", &monitor_residual, PETSC_NULL);
198
199 PetscCheck(!(cuda_process && kokkos_process), PETSC_COMM_SELF, PETSC_ERR_ARG_WRONG,
200 "-cuda_process and -kokkos_process are mutually exclusive; choose one preprocessing backend");
201 PetscCheck(!((cuda_process || kokkos_process) && dmplex_geom_process), PETSC_COMM_SELF, PETSC_ERR_ARG_WRONG,
202 "-dmplex_geom_process is mutually exclusive with -cuda_process and -kokkos_process");
203#if defined(BIOFEM_BACKEND_CUDA)
204 PetscCheck(!kokkos_process, PETSC_COMM_SELF, PETSC_ERR_ARG_WRONG,
205 "This executable was built for direct CUDA; use -cuda_process 1 -kokkos_process 0");
206#elif defined(BIOFEM_BACKEND_KOKKOS)
207 PetscCheck(!cuda_process, PETSC_COMM_SELF, PETSC_ERR_ARG_WRONG,
208 "This executable was built for Kokkos; use -kokkos_process 1 -cuda_process 0");
209#else
210 PetscCheck(!cuda_process, PETSC_COMM_SELF, PETSC_ERR_ARG_WRONG,
211 "This executable was built without direct CUDA; rebuild with USE_CUDA=1");
212 PetscCheck(!kokkos_process, PETSC_COMM_SELF, PETSC_ERR_ARG_WRONG,
213 "This executable was built without Kokkos; rebuild with USE_KOKKOS=1");
214#endif
215
216 PetscOptionsGetString(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-out_dir", out_dir, 255, PETSC_NULL);
217 PetscOptionsGetString(PETSC_NULL, PETSC_NULL, "-in_dir", in_dir, 255, PETSC_NULL);
218
219 PetscInt ibi, k;
220 PetscErrorCode ierr;
221 PetscReal tcyc=0.76, t, alpha[4]; alpha[0] = 0.25; alpha[1] = 1./3.; alpha[2] = 0.5; alpha[3] = 1.0;
222 SNES snes;
223 Mat J = NULL;
224 FE *fem;
225 IBMNodes *ibm;
226
227 PetscMPIInt rank;
228 MPI_Comm_rank(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, &rank);
229 if (rank == 0) mkdir(out_dir, 0755);
230
231 PetscCalloc1(nbody, &fem);
232 PetscCalloc1(nbody, &ibm);
233
234 for (ibi=0; ibi<nbody; ibi++) {
235 /* Link ibm pointer on ALL ranks so Free() is safe even when Init is skipped */
236 fem[ibi].ibm = &ibm[ibi];
237
238 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "Initializing body %d \n", ibi);
239
240 /* Phase 1: Mesh topology + C arrays (no Vecs created here). */
241 if (lv_geom_process) {
242 /* LV mesh: analytic + deterministic — run on ALL ranks. */
243 LVParams lv_p;
244 ierr = LVParamsCreate(&lv_p); CHKERRQ(ierr);
245 if (rank == 0) {
246 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "[lv] a=%.2f b=%.2f f_cut=%.2f N_theta=%d N_phi=%d alpha_endo=%.1f alpha_epi=%.1f\n",
247 lv_p.a, lv_p.b, lv_p.f_cut, (int)lv_p.N_theta, (int)lv_p.N_phi,
248 lv_p.alpha_endo, lv_p.alpha_epi);
249 }
250 ierr = CreateLVMesh(&ibm[ibi], &fem[ibi], &lv_p); CHKERRQ(ierr);
251 if (rank == 0) {
252 char lv_vtk_path[512];
253 snprintf(lv_vtk_path, sizeof(lv_vtk_path), "%s/lv_fiber_%02d.vtk", out_dir, (int)ibi);
254 ierr = WriteLVFiberVTK(&ibm[ibi], lv_vtk_path); CHKERRQ(ierr);
255 }
256 } else {
257 /* Standard mesh: read from files. */
258 Dimension(&ibm[ibi], ibi);
259 Create(&ibm[ibi], &fem[ibi], ibi);
260 Input(&ibm[ibi], ibi);
261 }
262 if (rank == 0) PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "Dimension of body %d is %d \n", ibi, ibm[ibi].n_v);
263
264 /* Phase 2: Active-strain data + DMPlex context.
265 * InitActStrainProblem must precede FEM_DMPlexGeomSetup because Setup calls
266 * ElemUpdateGeom0Subdiv which reads fem->act_data.elem_act_data. */
267 if (dmplex_geom_process || muscle_activation) {
268 ierr = InitActStrainProblem(&fem[ibi], ibi); CHKERRQ(ierr);
269 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "Active-Strain geometry/basis storage initialized.\n");
270 if (muscle_activation) {
271 ierr = FEM_DMPlexGeomSetup(&fem[ibi], PETSC_COMM_WORLD); CHKERRQ(ierr);
272 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "DMPlex geometry context initialized.\n");
273 }
274 }
275
276 /* Phase 3: Vec creation — parallel (VecCreateMPI) when geom_ctx.initialized,
277 * serial (VecCreateSeq) otherwise. */
278 ierr = InitVecs(&fem[ibi]); CHKERRQ(ierr);
279
280 /* Phase 4: Build ibm→global-DOF map for parallel Fint assembly.
281 * Requires Vec ownership ranges from InitVecs. */
282 if (muscle_activation) {
283 ierr = FEM_DMPlexGeomBuildNodeMap(&fem[ibi]); CHKERRQ(ierr);
284 }
285
286 /* Phase 5: Initialize Vec values from reference coordinates. */
287 Init(&fem[ibi], ibi);
288 if (rank == 0) PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "Init finished \n");
289
290 if (explicit) {VecSet(fem[ibi].Mass, 0.0); VecSet(fem[ibi].Dissip, 0.0); MassDamp(&fem[ibi]);}
291 if (tistart) {
292 LocationIn(&fem[ibi], tistart, ibi, out_dir);
293 }
294 }
295
296 if (dmplex_geom_process) {
297 ierr = RunDMPlexGeomProcesses(fem); CHKERRQ(ierr);
298 CleanupAndFinalize(fem, ibm, nbody);
299 return 0;
300 }
301
302 if (kokkos_process) {
303
304 ierr = RunKokkosProcesses(fem); CHKERRQ(ierr);
305
306 CleanupAndFinalize(fem, ibm, nbody);
307 return 0;
308 }
309
310 if (cuda_process) {
311
312 ierr = RunCudaProcesses(fem); CHKERRQ(ierr);
313 /* exit early after processing initialized bodies only */
314 CleanupAndFinalize(fem, ibm, nbody);
315 return 0;
316
317 }
318
319
320
321 if (manufactured_fexternal_export) {
322 PetscCheck(muscle_activation && manufactured, PETSC_COMM_SELF, PETSC_ERR_ARG_WRONG,
323 "-manufactured_fexternal_export requires both -manufactured 1 and -muscle_activation 1");
324
325 for (ibi = 0; ibi < nbody; ibi++) {
326 PetscCall(GenerateManufacturedFExternalAndKinematicsAllTimeSteps(&fem[ibi], ibi));
327 }
328 CleanupAndFinalize(fem, ibm, nbody);
329 return 0;
330 }
331
332
333 if(inverse){
334 InvSolver(fem);
335
336 PetscBarrier(PETSC_NULL);
337 }
338
339 if (tistart) tistart++;
340 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "Starting time-stepping loop from tistart = %d for %d steps \n", tistart, tisteps);
341
342 if (monitor_residual && rank == 0) {
343 char res_log_path[512];
344 snprintf(res_log_path, sizeof(res_log_path), "%s/residual.log", out_dir);
345 res_log_fp = fopen(res_log_path, "w");
346 if (res_log_fp) {
347 fprintf(res_log_fp, "# timestep snes_iter rnorm\n");
348 fflush(res_log_fp);
349 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "[monitor] writing residuals to %s\n", res_log_path);
350 }
351 }
352
353 // if (tistart==0) tisteps ++;
354
355 for (ti=tistart; ti<tistart+tisteps; ti++) {
356
357 for (ibi=0; ibi<nbody; ibi++) {
358 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "body:%d Time(%d)=%le\n", ibi, ti, ti*dt);
359 // if (contact==1) {ContactZ(&fem[ibi]);}
360
361
362 if (explicit) {
363 //------------------Explicit RK Solver
364 for (k=0; k<4; k++) {
365 FormRK(fem[ibi].Res, fem[ibi].x, fem[ibi].xn, fem[ibi].y, fem[ibi].yn, alpha[k], &fem[ibi]);
366 }
367
368 } else {
369 //------------------Implicit SNES solver
370 /* Typical options
371 -fem_snes_mf
372 #-fem_snes_type tr
373 -fem_snes_max_it 20
374 -fem_snes_monitor
375 #-fem_ksp_type fgmres */
376
377 Vec U;
378 PetscErrorCode ierr;
379 SNESConvergedReason reason;
380 VecDuplicate(fem[ibi].x, &U);
381 VecCopy(fem[ibi].x, U);
382
383 /* Trace vertex 20 (first free ring) at key stages.
384 * ibm->x_bp is replicated on all ranks after each FormFunctionFEM Allreduce. */
385#define TRACE_V 20
386 {
387 IBMNodes *tibm = fem[ibi].ibm;
388 if (!rank) PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF,
389 "[TRACE ti=%d] BEFORE SNES: x_bp[%d]=(%g,%g,%g) disp_z=%g\n",
390 ti, TRACE_V,
391 tibm->x_bp[TRACE_V], tibm->y_bp[TRACE_V], tibm->z_bp[TRACE_V],
392 tibm->z_bp[TRACE_V]-tibm->z_bp0[TRACE_V]);
393 }
394
395 //SNES
396 SNESCreate(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, &snes);
397 SNESSetFunction(snes, fem[ibi].Res, FormFunctionFEM, (void *)&fem[ibi]);
398 SNESAppendOptionsPrefix(snes, "fem_");
399 MatCreateSNESMF(snes, &J); //MatrixFree
400 // SNESSetJacobian(snes, J, J, MatMFFDComputeJacobian, (void *)&fem[ibi]);
401 SNESSetJacobian(snes, J, J, NULL, (void *)&fem[ibi]);
402 SNESSetFromOptions(snes);
403 if (monitor_residual && res_log_fp) {
404 SNESMonitorSet(snes, ResidualMonitor, NULL, NULL);
405 }
406
407 ierr = SNESSolve(snes, PETSC_NULL, U);
408 if (ierr) {
409 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD,
410 "SNESSolve failed with ierr=%d for body %d at step %d\n",
411 (int)ierr, (int)ibi, (int)ti);
412 SNESDestroy(&snes);
413 MatDestroy(&J);
414 VecDestroy(&U);
415 PetscFinalize();
416 return (int)ierr;
417 }
418
419 ierr = SNESGetConvergedReason(snes, &reason);
420 if (ierr) {
421 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD,
422 "SNESGetConvergedReason failed with ierr=%d for body %d at step %d\n",
423 (int)ierr, (int)ibi, (int)ti);
424 SNESDestroy(&snes);
425 MatDestroy(&J);
426 VecDestroy(&U);
427 PetscFinalize();
428 return (int)ierr;
429 }
430
431 {
432 IBMNodes *tibm = fem[ibi].ibm;
433 if (!rank) PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF,
434 "[TRACE ti=%d] AFTER SNES: x_bp[%d]=(%g,%g,%g) disp_z=%g reason=%d\n",
435 ti, TRACE_V,
436 tibm->x_bp[TRACE_V], tibm->y_bp[TRACE_V], tibm->z_bp[TRACE_V],
437 tibm->z_bp[TRACE_V]-tibm->z_bp0[TRACE_V], (int)reason);
438 }
439
440 if (reason >= 0) {
441 VecCopy(U, fem[ibi].x);
442 } else {
443 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD,
444 "Skipping solution update because SNES diverged (reason=%d) for body %d at step %d\n",
445 (int)reason, (int)ibi, (int)ti);
446 /* ibm->x_bp was dirtied by FormFunctionFEM during failed SNES iterations.
447 * Restore it from fem->x so Output and xAccVel use the correct state. */
448 {
449 DMPlexGeomCtx *gctx_ = &fem[ibi].geom_ctx;
450 IBMNodes *ibm_ = fem[ibi].ibm;
451 if (gctx_->initialized) {
452 const PetscReal *fx;
453 PetscMPIInt fmyrank_;
454 MPI_Comm_rank(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, &fmyrank_);
455 PetscMemzero(ibm_->x_bp, ibm_->n_v * sizeof(PetscReal));
456 PetscMemzero(ibm_->y_bp, ibm_->n_v * sizeof(PetscReal));
457 PetscMemzero(ibm_->z_bp, ibm_->n_v * sizeof(PetscReal));
458 VecGetArrayRead(fem[ibi].x, &fx);
459 PetscInt oi_ = 0;
460 for (PetscInt lv = 0; lv < gctx_->nLocalVerts; ++lv) {
461 PetscInt v = gctx_->origVert[lv];
462 if (v < 0 || v >= ibm_->n_v || gctx_->ownerRank[v] != fmyrank_) continue;
463 ibm_->x_bp[v] = fx[oi_*dof ];
464 ibm_->y_bp[v] = fx[oi_*dof+1];
465 ibm_->z_bp[v] = fx[oi_*dof+2];
466 oi_++;
467 }
468 VecRestoreArrayRead(fem[ibi].x, &fx);
469 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, ibm_->x_bp, ibm_->n_v, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD);
470 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, ibm_->y_bp, ibm_->n_v, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD);
471 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, ibm_->z_bp, ibm_->n_v, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD);
472 }
473 }
474 }
475
476 {
477 IBMNodes *tibm = fem[ibi].ibm;
478 if (!rank) PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF,
479 "[TRACE ti=%d] AFTER UPDATE: x_bp[%d]=(%g,%g,%g) disp_z=%g\n",
480 ti, TRACE_V,
481 tibm->x_bp[TRACE_V], tibm->y_bp[TRACE_V], tibm->z_bp[TRACE_V],
482 tibm->z_bp[TRACE_V]-tibm->z_bp0[TRACE_V]);
483 }
484
485 /* Only destroy if SNESSolve didn't corrupt the object */
486 if (snes != NULL) {
487 PetscErrorCode destroy_ierr = SNESDestroy(&snes);
488 if (destroy_ierr != 0) {
489 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, " WARNING: SNESDestroy failed with ierr = %d\n", destroy_ierr);
490 } else {
491 // PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, " after SNESDestroy\n");
492 }
493 }
494
495 /* Destroy the Jacobian matrix created by MatCreateSNESMF */
496 MatDestroy(&J);
497
498 VecDestroy(&U);
499
500 }
501 VecCopy(fem[ibi].x, fem[ibi].y); //for contact energy calculations
502 xAccVel(&fem[ibi]);
503 //VecCopy(fem[ibi].xd, fem[ibi].y);
504
505 if (contact==1) {ContactZ(&fem[ibi]);}
506
507
508 } //ibi
509
510 t = dt*(ti);
511 // t = t - ((PetscInt)(t/tcyc))*tcyc;
512 //if (contact==1 && t>0.03) {Fcontact(fem);} //dynamic_bhv
513 //if (contact==2 && t>0.075) {Fcontact2(fem);} //dynamic_bhv
514 if (contact) {Fcontact(fem);} //static_bhv
515
516 for (ibi=0; ibi<nbody; ibi++) {
517
518 // Contact(&fem[ibi]);
519 VecCopy(fem[ibi].xn, fem[ibi].xnm1);
520 VecCopy(fem[ibi].x, fem[ibi].xn);
521
522// {
523// PetscInt node = 117; /* change as needed */
524// PetscReal *FF = NULL;
525// PetscInt n_v = ibm->n_v;
526// if (node >= 0 && node < n_v) {
527// VecGetArray(fem[ibi].Fint, &FF);
528// PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "Fint af cont at node %d: %le %le %le\n",
529// node, FF[dof*node], FF[dof*node+1], FF[dof*node+2]);
530// VecRestoreArray(fem[ibi].Fint, &FF);
531// } else {
532// PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "requested node %d out of range (n_v=%d)\n", node, n_v);
533// }
534// }
535
536 PetscReal norm=0.0, normv=0.0, norma=0.0, normfint=0.;
537 VecCopy(fem[ibi].x, fem[ibi].dx);
538 VecAXPY(fem[ibi].dx, -1., fem[ibi].xnm1);
539 VecNorm(fem[ibi].dx, NORM_2, &norm);
540 VecNorm(fem[ibi].xd, NORM_INFINITY, &normv);
541 VecNorm(fem[ibi].xdd, NORM_INFINITY, &norma);
542 VecNorm(fem[ibi].Fint, NORM_INFINITY, &normfint);
543
544 PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, "body:%d Norm(x-xn)= %le Vel %f Acc %f Fint %f\n",ibi,norm,normv,norma, normfint);
545 }
546
547 // if (contact) {Fcontact(fem);} //static_bhv
548 // Printout the results
549 if (ti == (ti/tiout)*tiout){
550 for (ibi=0; ibi<nbody; ibi++) {
551 /* ti+1: file 0 = reference (Init), file 1..N = post-SNES deformed states */
552 Output(&fem[ibi], ti+1, ibi, out_dir);
553 if (outghost) {OutputGhost(&fem[ibi], ti, ibi, out_dir);}
554 }
555 }
556 }// ti
557
558 if (res_log_fp) { fclose(res_log_fp); res_log_fp = NULL; }
559
560 /* Finish UP: output final state and cleanup on rank 0 only */
561 if (rank == 0) {
562 for (ibi=0; ibi<nbody; ibi++) {
563 LocationOut(&fem[ibi], ti+1, ibi, out_dir);
564 if(outghost){OutputGhost(&fem[ibi], ti, ibi, out_dir);}
565 }
566 }
567 CleanupAndFinalize(fem, ibm, nbody);
568 return(0);
569}
LocationOut
PetscErrorCode LocationOut(FE *fem, PetscInt ti, PetscInt ibi, const char *out_dir)
Definition io.c:1037
InitActStrainProblem
PetscErrorCode InitActStrainProblem(FE *fem, PetscInt ibi)
Initialize active-strain module (options, storage, and quadrature).
Definition active_strain.c:2005
Fcontact
PetscErrorCode Fcontact(FE *fem)
Definition contact.c:39
RunCudaProcesses
PetscErrorCode RunCudaProcesses(FE *fem)
Definition cuda_processes.c:201
FEM_DMPlexGeomBuildNodeMap
PetscErrorCode FEM_DMPlexGeomBuildNodeMap(FE *fem)
Build ibm_to_global_dof0 mapping in fem->geom_ctx.
Definition dmplex_geom.c:901
RunDMPlexGeomProcesses
PetscErrorCode RunDMPlexGeomProcesses(FE *fem)
Benchmark: run the full distributed DMPlex geometry pipeline for all bodies.
Definition dmplex_geom.c:699
FEM_DMPlexGeomSetup
PetscErrorCode FEM_DMPlexGeomSetup(FE *fem, MPI_Comm comm)
One-time DMPlex geometry setup.
Definition dmplex_geom.c:799
InvSolver
PetscErrorCode InvSolver(FE *fem)
Definition inverse.c:813
Dimension
PetscErrorCode Dimension(IBMNodes *ibm, PetscInt ibi)
Definition io.c:30
Output
PetscErrorCode Output(FE *fem, PetscInt ti, PetscInt ibi, const char *out_dir)
Definition io.c:527
Input
PetscErrorCode Input(IBMNodes *ibm, PetscInt ibi)
Definition io.c:360
Create
PetscErrorCode Create(IBMNodes *ibm, FE *fem, PetscInt ibi)
Definition io.c:80
LocationIn
PetscErrorCode LocationIn(FE *fem, PetscInt ti, PetscInt ibi, const char *out_dir)
Definition io.c:1220

577 {
578
579 //y=dx/dt
580 IBMNodes *ibm=fem->ibm;
581 PetscErrorCode ierr;
582 PetscReal *xx, *RR, *RRes, *FF;
583 PetscInt nv;
584 Vec w1, w2;
585
586 VecDuplicate(R, &w1);
587 VecDuplicate(R, &w2);
588
589 //---------Update the location
590 VecGetArray(x, &xx);
591 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v+ibm->n_ghosts; nv++) {
592 ibm->x_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof ];
593 ibm->y_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof+1];
594 ibm->z_bp[nv] = xx[nv*dof+2];
595 if(twod){ibm->z_bp[nv] = ibm->z_bp0[nv];} //2d case
596 }
597 VecRestoreArray(x, &xx);
598
599 //---------------------------Patchtest---------------------------------------------------------------------
600 /* PetscInt i, start, end, edge_n, edge; */

605 /* } */
606 /* start = end - ibm->n_bnodes[edge_n]; */
607
608 /* for (i=start; i<end; i++) { //moving boundary nodes */
609 /* nv = ibm->bnodes[i]; */
610 /* ibm->x_bp[nv] = 2.*ibm->x_bp0[nv]; */
611 /* ibm->y_bp[nv] = ibm->y_bp0[nv]; */
612 /* ibm->z_bp[nv] = ibm->z_bp0[nv]; */
613 /* } */
614 /* } */
615
616 /* for (nv=ibm->n_v; nv<ibm->n_v+ibm->n_ghosts; nv++) { //moving ghost nodes */
617 /* ibm->x_bp[nv] = 2.*ibm->x_bp0[nv]; */
618 /* ibm->y_bp[nv] = ibm->y_bp0[nv]; */
619 /* ibm->z_bp[nv] = ibm->z_bp0[nv]; */
620 /* } */
621 //---------------------------Patchtest---------------------------------------------------------------------
622
623 AreaNormal(ibm);
624 if (bending){
625 if (curvature==1) {
626 PatchLoc(ibm);
627 GhostLoc(fem);
628 } else if (curvature==6) {
629 //GlobalGhost(ibm);
630 }
631 }
632
633 //---------Compute Forces then Residual
634 VecSet(fem->Fext, 0.0); VecSet(fem->Fint, 0.0);
635 VecSet(R, 0.0); VecSet(fem->FJ, 0.0);
636
637 FInternal(fem);
638 ierr = FExternal(fem); CHKERRQ(ierr);
639
640 VecWAXPY(R, -1., fem->Fint, fem->Fext);
641
642 VecPointwiseMult(w1, fem->Dissip,y);
643 VecAXPY(R, -1., w1);
644 VecPointwiseDivide(w2, R, fem->Mass);
645 VecCopy(w2, R);
646
647 VecWAXPY(x, alpha*dt, y, xn);
648 VecWAXPY(y, alpha*dt, R, yn);
649
650 //---------2d case
651 if(twod){
652 VecGetArray(x, &xx);
653 VecGetArray(R, &RR);
654 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++) {
655 xx[nv*dof+2] = ibm->z_bp0[nv];
656 RR[nv*dof+2] = 0.0;
657 }
658 VecRestoreArray(R, &RR);
659 VecRestoreArray(x, &xx);
660 }
661
662 //---------------------------Patchtest---------------------------------------------------------------------
663 /* VecGetArray(x, &xx); */
664 /* for (edge_n=0; edge_n<ibm->n_edge; edge_n++){ */
665 /* start = 0; end = 0; */
666 /* for (edge=0; edge<edge_n+1; edge++) { */
667 /* end += ibm->n_bnodes[edge]; */
668 /* } */
669 /* start = end - ibm->n_bnodes[edge_n]; */
670
671 /* for (i=start; i<end; i++) { */
672 /* nv = ibm->bnodes[i]; */
673 /* xx[nv*dof] = 2.*ibm->x_bp0[nv]; */
674 /* xx[nv*dof+1] = ibm->y_bp0[nv]; */
675 /* xx[nv*dof+2] = ibm->z_bp0[nv]; */
676 /* } */
677 /* } */
678
679 /* for (nv=ibm->n_v; nv<ibm->n_v+ibm->n_ghosts; nv++) { */

683 /* } */

686 //---------------------------Patchtest---------------------------------------------------------------------
687

833
834 for (i=0; i<9; i++) {Fm[i]=0.0; Fint[i]=0.0;}
835 for (i=0; i<42; i++) {Fb[i]=0.0;}
836
837 PetscReal *FF,*FFJ;
838 VecGetArray(fem->Fint, &FF);
839 VecGetArray(fem->FJ, &FFJ);
840
841 //PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "CHECK size inside FINTERNAL = %d\n", ibm->n_v);
842
843 for (ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt; ec++) {
844 n1e=ibm->nv1[ec];n2e=ibm->nv2[ec];n3e=ibm->nv3[ec];
845 n4e=ibm->nv4[ec];n5e=ibm->nv5[ec];n6e=ibm->nv6[ec];
846
847 //current location
848 x1.x=ibm->x_bp[n1e]; x1.y=ibm->y_bp[n1e]; x1.z=ibm->z_bp[n1e];
849 x2.x=ibm->x_bp[n2e]; x2.y=ibm->y_bp[n2e]; x2.z=ibm->z_bp[n2e];
850 x3.x=ibm->x_bp[n3e]; x3.y=ibm->y_bp[n3e]; x3.z=ibm->z_bp[n3e];
851 //initial location
852 X1.x=ibm->x_bp0[n1e]; X1.y=ibm->y_bp0[n1e]; X1.z=ibm->z_bp0[n1e];
853 X2.x=ibm->x_bp0[n2e]; X2.y=ibm->y_bp0[n2e]; X2.z=ibm->z_bp0[n2e];
854 X3.x=ibm->x_bp0[n3e]; X3.y=ibm->y_bp0[n3e]; X3.z=ibm->z_bp0[n3e];
855
856 if (curvature==1) {
857 if (membrane) {
858 Fmembrane(ec, X1, X2, X3, x1, x2, x3, Fm, fem);
859 }
860 }
861 //PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "Check before Fbending %d\n", bending);
862
863 if (bending) {
864 // if (muscle_activation){
865 // ElemUpdFint(fem, ec, Fb);
866 // }
867 // else{
868 Fbending(ec, X1, X2, X3, x1, x2, x3, Fb, fem);
869 // }
870
871 }
872 //PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "Check after Fbending!\n");
873
874 if (curvature==1) { //Only bending
875 for (i=0; i<9; i++) {
876 Fint[i]=Fm[i]+Fb[i];
877 } //end loop over nodes of each element
878
879 FF[n1e*dof] +=Fint[0];
880 FF[n1e*dof+1] +=Fint[1];
881 FF[n1e*dof+2] +=Fint[2];
882
883 FF[n2e*dof] +=Fint[3];
884 FF[n2e*dof+1] +=Fint[4];
885 FF[n2e*dof+2] +=Fint[5];
886
887 FF[n3e*dof] +=Fint[6];
888 FF[n3e*dof+1] +=Fint[7];
889 FF[n3e*dof+2] +=Fint[8];
890
891 if(n4e !=1000000){ // Front node is inside domain
892 FF[n4e*dof] +=Fb[9];
893 FF[n4e*dof+1] +=Fb[10];
894 FF[n4e*dof+2] +=Fb[11];
895 }else{ // Front node is ghost
896 FFJ[n1e*dof] +=Fb[9];
897 FFJ[n1e*dof+1] +=Fb[10];
898 FFJ[n1e*dof+2] +=Fb[11];
899 }
900
901 if(n5e !=1000000){// Front node is inside domain
902 FF[n5e*dof] +=Fb[12];
903 FF[n5e*dof+1] +=Fb[13];
904 FF[n5e*dof+2] +=Fb[14];
905 }else{ // Front node is ghost
906 FFJ[n2e*dof] +=Fb[12];
907 FFJ[n2e*dof+1] +=Fb[13];
908 FFJ[n2e*dof+2] +=Fb[14];
909 }
910
911 if(n6e !=1000000){// Front node is inside domain
912 FF[n6e*dof] +=Fb[15];
913 FF[n6e*dof+1] +=Fb[16];
914 FF[n6e*dof+2] +=Fb[17];
915 }else{ // Front node is ghost
916 FFJ[n3e*dof] +=Fb[15];
917 FFJ[n3e*dof+1] +=Fb[16];
918 FFJ[n3e*dof+2] +=Fb[17];
919 }
920
921 } else if (curvature==6) {
922
923 PetscInt node, v = ibm->val[ec];
924
925 for (i=0; i<(v+6); i++) {
926 if (ibm->patch[16*ec+i]!=1000000) {
927 node = ibm->patch[16*ec+i];
928
929 FF[dof*node] += Fb[dof*i];
930 FF[dof*node+1] += Fb[dof*i+1];
931 FF[dof*node+2] += Fb[dof*i+2];
932
933 }
934 }
935 }
936 }//end loop over elements
937
938 VecRestoreArray(fem->FJ, &FFJ);
939 VecRestoreArray(fem->Fint, &FF);
940
941 if (bending && curvature==1) {ModifyFbending(fem);}
942
943 return(0);
944}

◆ FDynamic()

PetscErrorCode FDynamic ( FE *  fem)

Definition at line 947 of file main.c.

947 {
948
949 IBMNodes *ibm=fem->ibm;
950 DMPlexGeomCtx *gctx = &fem->geom_ctx;
951
952 PetscInt i;
953 PetscReal M[9], C[9], Fd[9], x[9], xn[9], xnm1[9], xd[9], xdd[9];
954 PetscInt n1e, n2e, n3e;
955 PetscReal Gama=0.5, Beta=0.25;
956 PetscReal M1, C1, M2, C2, M3, C3;
957
958 for (i=0; i<9; i++) {M[i]=0.0; C[i]=0.0; Fd[i]=0.0;}
959 M1=1./(Beta*pow(dt,2)); M2=1./(Beta*dt); M3=(1./(2*Beta))-1.;
960 C1=Gama/(Beta*dt); C2=(Gama/Beta)-1; C3=dt*(Gama/(2.*Beta)-1);
961
962 if (gctx->initialized) {
963 /* Parallel path. x (current position) is already fully replicated in
964 * ibm->x_bp/y_bp/z_bp by FormFunctionFEM before FDynamic runs. xn/xnm1/
965 * xd/xdd live only in distributed Vecs, so replicate them the same way
966 * (zero, fill owned entries, Allreduce-sum) — mirrors the ibm->x_bp sync
967 * in FormFunctionFEM. Fdyn contributions are written with VecSetValues
968 * against the global DOF map, mirroring FInternalAct's Fint assembly, so
969 * PETSc routes off-process contributions during VecAssemblyBegin/End. */
970 PetscErrorCode ierr;
971 PetscInt nv = ibm->n_v;
972 PetscReal *xn_bp, *yn_bp, *zn_bp, *xnm1_bp, *ynm1_bp, *znm1_bp;
973 PetscReal *xd_bp, *yd_bp, *zd_bp, *xdd_bp, *ydd_bp, *zdd_bp;
974 PetscMPIInt myrank;
975
976 MPI_Comm_rank(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, &myrank);
977
978 PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &xn_bp)); PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &yn_bp)); PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &zn_bp));
979 PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &xnm1_bp)); PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &ynm1_bp)); PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &znm1_bp));
980 PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &xd_bp)); PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &yd_bp)); PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &zd_bp));
981 PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &xdd_bp)); PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &ydd_bp)); PetscCall(PetscMalloc1(nv, &zdd_bp));
982
983#define FDYN_GATHER(vec, bx, by, bz) do { \
984 const PetscReal *_a; \
985 PetscMemzero((bx), nv * sizeof(PetscReal)); \
986 PetscMemzero((by), nv * sizeof(PetscReal)); \
987 PetscMemzero((bz), nv * sizeof(PetscReal)); \
988 VecGetArrayRead((vec), &_a); \
989 { \
990 PetscInt oi = 0; \
991 for (PetscInt lv = 0; lv < gctx->nLocalVerts; ++lv) { \
992 PetscInt v = gctx->origVert[lv]; \
993 if (v < 0 || v >= nv || gctx->ownerRank[v] != myrank) continue; \
994 (bx)[v] = _a[oi*dof ]; \
995 (by)[v] = _a[oi*dof+1]; \
996 (bz)[v] = _a[oi*dof+2]; \
997 oi++; \
998 } \
999 } \
1000 VecRestoreArrayRead((vec), &_a); \
1001 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, (bx), nv, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD); \
1002 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, (by), nv, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD); \
1003 MPI_Allreduce(MPI_IN_PLACE, (bz), nv, MPIU_REAL, MPI_SUM, PETSC_COMM_WORLD); \
1004 } while (0)
1005
1006 FDYN_GATHER(fem->xn, xn_bp, yn_bp, zn_bp);
1007 FDYN_GATHER(fem->xnm1, xnm1_bp, ynm1_bp, znm1_bp);
1008 FDYN_GATHER(fem->xd, xd_bp, yd_bp, zd_bp);
1009 FDYN_GATHER(fem->xdd, xdd_bp, ydd_bp, zdd_bp);
1010#undef FDYN_GATHER
1011
1012 for (PetscInt lc = 0; lc < gctx->layout.nLocalCells; ++lc) {
1013 const PetscInt ec = gctx->layout.orig_cell[lc];
1014 if (ec < 0 || ec >= ibm->n_elmt) continue;
1015 PetscReal facc, fvel;
1016
1017 n1e=ibm->nv1[ec]; n2e=ibm->nv2[ec]; n3e=ibm->nv3[ec];
1018
1019 x[0]=ibm->x_bp[n1e]; x[1]=ibm->y_bp[n1e]; x[2]=ibm->z_bp[n1e];
1020 x[3]=ibm->x_bp[n2e]; x[4]=ibm->y_bp[n2e]; x[5]=ibm->z_bp[n2e];
1021 x[6]=ibm->x_bp[n3e]; x[7]=ibm->y_bp[n3e]; x[8]=ibm->z_bp[n3e];
1022
1023 xn[0]=xn_bp[n1e]; xn[1]=yn_bp[n1e]; xn[2]=zn_bp[n1e];
1024 xn[3]=xn_bp[n2e]; xn[4]=yn_bp[n2e]; xn[5]=zn_bp[n2e];
1025 xn[6]=xn_bp[n3e]; xn[7]=yn_bp[n3e]; xn[8]=zn_bp[n3e];
1026
1027 xnm1[0]=xnm1_bp[n1e]; xnm1[1]=ynm1_bp[n1e]; xnm1[2]=znm1_bp[n1e];
1028 xnm1[3]=xnm1_bp[n2e]; xnm1[4]=ynm1_bp[n2e]; xnm1[5]=znm1_bp[n2e];
1029 xnm1[6]=xnm1_bp[n3e]; xnm1[7]=ynm1_bp[n3e]; xnm1[8]=znm1_bp[n3e];
1030
1031 xd[0]=xd_bp[n1e]; xd[1]=yd_bp[n1e]; xd[2]=zd_bp[n1e];
1032 xd[3]=xd_bp[n2e]; xd[4]=yd_bp[n2e]; xd[5]=zd_bp[n2e];
1033 xd[6]=xd_bp[n3e]; xd[7]=yd_bp[n3e]; xd[8]=zd_bp[n3e];
1034
1035 xdd[0]=xdd_bp[n1e]; xdd[1]=ydd_bp[n1e]; xdd[2]=zdd_bp[n1e];
1036 xdd[3]=xdd_bp[n2e]; xdd[4]=ydd_bp[n2e]; xdd[5]=zdd_bp[n2e];
1037 xdd[6]=xdd_bp[n3e]; xdd[7]=ydd_bp[n3e]; xdd[8]=zdd_bp[n3e];
1038
1039 Mass(ibm, ec, M);
1040 if (damping) { Damp(ibm, M, C); }
1041
1042 if (timeinteg==0) { //Newmark constant average acceleration
1043 for (i=0; i<9; i++) {
1044 facc=M[i]*(M1*xn[i]+M2*xd[i]+M3*xdd[i]);
1045 fvel=C[i]*(C1*xn[i]+C2*xd[i]+C3*xdd[i]);
1046 Fd[i]=M[i]*M1*x[i]+C[i]*C1*x[i]-facc-fvel;
1047 }
1048 } else if (timeinteg==1) { //central
1049 for (i=0; i<9; i++) {
1050 Fd[i]=M[i]*(x[i]-2*xn[i]+xnm1[i])/(dt*dt)+C[i]*(x[i]-xn[i])/dt;
1051 }
1052 }
1053
1054 {
1055 PetscInt nodes[3] = {n1e, n2e, n3e};
1056 for (PetscInt k=0; k<3; k++) {
1057 PetscInt gdof0 = gctx->ibm_to_global_dof0[nodes[k]];
1058 if (gdof0 < 0) continue;
1059 PetscInt dofs[3] = {gdof0, gdof0+1, gdof0+2};
1060 PetscReal vals[3] = {Fd[3*k], Fd[3*k+1], Fd[3*k+2]};
1061 ierr = VecSetValues(fem->Fdyn, 3, dofs, vals, ADD_VALUES); CHKERRQ(ierr);
1062 }
1063 }
1064 }//end loop over local elements
1065
1066 ierr = VecAssemblyBegin(fem->Fdyn); CHKERRQ(ierr);
1067 ierr = VecAssemblyEnd(fem->Fdyn); CHKERRQ(ierr);
1068
1069 PetscCall(PetscFree(xn_bp)); PetscCall(PetscFree(yn_bp)); PetscCall(PetscFree(zn_bp));
1070 PetscCall(PetscFree(xnm1_bp)); PetscCall(PetscFree(ynm1_bp)); PetscCall(PetscFree(znm1_bp));
1071 PetscCall(PetscFree(xd_bp)); PetscCall(PetscFree(yd_bp)); PetscCall(PetscFree(zd_bp));
1072 PetscCall(PetscFree(xdd_bp)); PetscCall(PetscFree(ydd_bp)); PetscCall(PetscFree(zdd_bp));
1073
1074 return 0;
1075 }
1076
1077 PetscReal *xx,*xxn,*xxnm1,*xxd,*xxdd,*FF,facc,fvel;
1078 VecGetArray(fem->xd, &xxd);
1079 VecGetArray(fem->xdd, &xxdd);
1080 VecGetArray(fem->xn, &xxn);
1081 VecGetArray(fem->xnm1, &xxnm1);
1082 VecGetArray(fem->x, &xx);
1083 VecGetArray(fem->Fdyn, &FF);
1084
1085 for (ec=0; ec<ibm->n_elmt+2*ibm->n_ghosts; ec++) {
1086 n1e=ibm->nv1[ec];n2e=ibm->nv2[ec];n3e=ibm->nv3[ec];
1087
1088 x[0]=ibm->x_bp[n1e]; x[1]=ibm->y_bp[n1e]; x[2]=ibm->z_bp[n1e];
1089 x[3]=ibm->x_bp[n2e]; x[4]=ibm->y_bp[n2e]; x[5]=ibm->z_bp[n2e];
1090 x[6]=ibm->x_bp[n3e]; x[7]=ibm->y_bp[n3e]; x[8]=ibm->z_bp[n3e];
1091
1092 xn[0]=xxn[n1e*dof]; xn[1]=xxn[n1e*dof+1]; xn[2]=xxn[n1e*dof+2];
1093 xn[3]=xxn[n2e*dof]; xn[4]=xxn[n2e*dof+1]; xn[5]=xxn[n2e*dof+2];
1094 xn[6]=xxn[n3e*dof]; xn[7]=xxn[n3e*dof+1]; xn[8]=xxn[n3e*dof+2];
1095
1096 xnm1[0]=xxnm1[n1e*dof]; xnm1[1]=xxnm1[n1e*dof+1]; xnm1[2]=xxnm1[n1e*dof+2];
1097 xnm1[3]=xxnm1[n2e*dof]; xnm1[4]=xxnm1[n2e*dof+1]; xnm1[5]=xxnm1[n2e*dof+2];
1098 xnm1[6]=xxnm1[n3e*dof]; xnm1[7]=xxnm1[n3e*dof+1]; xnm1[8]=xxnm1[n3e*dof+2];
1099
1100 xd[0]=xxd[n1e*dof]; xd[1]=xxd[n1e*dof+1]; xd[2]=xxd[n1e*dof+2];
1101 xd[3]=xxd[n2e*dof]; xd[4]=xxd[n2e*dof+1]; xd[5]=xxd[n2e*dof+2];
1102 xd[6]=xxd[n3e*dof]; xd[7]=xxd[n3e*dof+1]; xd[8]=xxd[n3e*dof+2];
1103
1104 xdd[0]=xxdd[n1e*dof]; xdd[1]=xxdd[n1e*dof+1]; xdd[2]=xxdd[n1e*dof+2];
1105 xdd[3]=xxdd[n2e*dof]; xdd[4]=xxdd[n2e*dof+1]; xdd[5]=xxdd[n2e*dof+2];
1106 xdd[6]=xxdd[n3e*dof]; xdd[7]=xxdd[n3e*dof+1]; xdd[8]=xxdd[n3e*dof+2];
1107
1108 Mass(ibm, ec, M);
1109 if(damping) {Damp(ibm, M,C);}
1110
1111 if(timeinteg==0){ //Newmark constant average acceleration
1112 for (i=0; i<9; i++) {
1113 facc=M[i]*(M1*xn[i]+M2*xd[i]+M3*xdd[i]);
1114 fvel=C[i]*(C1*xn[i]+C2*xd[i]+C3*xdd[i]);
1115 Fd[i]=M[i]*M1*x[i]+C[i]*C1*x[i]-facc-fvel;
1116 }
1117
1118 }else if (timeinteg==1){ //central
1119 for (i=0; i<9; i++) {
1120 Fd[i]=M[i]*(x[i]-2*xn[i]+xnm1[i])/(dt*dt)+C[i]*(x[i]-xn[i])/dt;
1121 }
1122 }
1123 //AddToVector
1124
1125 FF[n1e*dof] +=Fd[0];
1126 FF[n1e*dof+1] +=Fd[1];
1127 FF[n1e*dof+2] +=Fd[2];
1128
1129 FF[n2e*dof] +=Fd[3];
1130 FF[n2e*dof+1] +=Fd[4];
1131 FF[n2e*dof+2] +=Fd[5];
1132
1133 FF[n3e*dof] +=Fd[6];
1134 FF[n3e*dof+1] +=Fd[7];
1135 FF[n3e*dof+2] +=Fd[8];
1136
1137 }//end loop over elements
1138
1139 VecRestoreArray(fem->x, &xx);
1140 VecRestoreArray(fem->xd, &xxd);
1141 VecRestoreArray(fem->xdd, &xxdd);
1142 VecRestoreArray(fem->xnm1, &xxnm1);
1143 VecRestoreArray(fem->xn, &xxn);
1144 VecRestoreArray(fem->Fdyn, &FF);
1145
1146 return(0);
1147}

1150 {
1151

1157 PetscReal Gama=0.5, Beta=0.25;
1158 PetscInt nv;
1159
1160 M1 = 1./(Beta*pow(dt,2)); M2 = 1./(Beta*dt); M3 = (1./(2*Beta)) - 1.;
1161 // C1 = Gama/(Beta*dt); C2 = (Gama/Beta) - 1; C3 = dt*(Gama/(2.*Beta) - 1);
1162 C2=(1.-Gama)*dt; C3=Gama*dt;

1169 {

1171 PetscInt n_iter = gctx->initialized ? ibm->n_v : ibm->n_v + ibm->n_ghosts;
1172 for (nv=0; nv<n_iter; nv++) {
1173 /* In parallel, use local Vec index li; serial: li == nv. */
1174 PetscInt li = (gctx->initialized) ? gctx->ibm_to_local_idx[nv] : nv;
1175 if (li < 0) continue;
1176
1177 xxdn1 = xxd[dof*li ];
1178 xxdn2 = xxd[dof*li+1];
1179 xxdn3 = xxd[dof*li+2];
1180 xxddn1= xxdd[dof*li ];
1181 xxddn2= xxdd[dof*li+1];
1182 xxddn3= xxdd[dof*li+2];
1183

1185 xxdd[dof*li+1] = M1*(xx[li*dof+1] - xxn[li*dof+1]) - M2*xxd[li*dof+1] - M3*xxdd[li*dof+1];
1186 xxdd[dof*li+2] = M1*(xx[li*dof+2] - xxn[li*dof+2]) - M2*xxd[li*dof+2] - M3*xxdd[li*dof+2];
1187
1188 xxd[dof*li ] = xxd[li*dof ] + C2*xxddn1 + C3*xxdd[li*dof ];
1189 xxd[dof*li+1] = xxd[li*dof+1] + C2*xxddn2 + C3*xxdd[li*dof+1];
1190 xxd[dof*li+2] = xxd[li*dof+2] + C2*xxddn3 + C3*xxdd[li*dof+2];
1191
1192 }
1193 }

1247
1248 /* PatchLoc inside InitGhost reads ibm->x_bp to set p4x/p4x0 etc.
1249 * Seed x_bp from x_bp0 (reference) so the reference curvature kve0
1250 * is computed from the correct geometry, not from uninitialized memory. */
1251 for (nv = 0; nv < ibm->n_v + ibm->n_ghosts; nv++) {
1252 ibm->x_bp[nv] = ibm->x_bp0[nv];
1253 ibm->y_bp[nv] = ibm->y_bp0[nv];

1259 {
1260 DMPlexGeomCtx *gctx = &fem->geom_ctx;
1261 if (gctx->initialized) {
1262 /* Parallel Vec: local array indexed by owned-vertex sequential index oi. */
1263 PetscMPIInt imyrank;
1264 MPI_Comm_rank(PETSC_COMM_WORLD, &imyrank);
1265 PetscInt oi = 0;
1266 for (PetscInt lv = 0; lv < gctx->nLocalVerts; ++lv) {
1267 PetscInt v = gctx->origVert[lv];
1268 if (v < 0 || v >= ibm->n_v || gctx->ownerRank[v] != imyrank) continue;
1269 xx[oi*dof ] = ibm->x_bp0[v];
1270 xx[oi*dof+1] = ibm->y_bp0[v];
1271 xx[oi*dof+2] = ibm->z_bp0[v];
1272 oi++;
1273 }
1274 } else {
1275 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v+ibm->n_ghosts; nv++) {
1276 xx[nv*dof ] = ibm->x_bp0[nv];
1277 xx[nv*dof+1] = ibm->y_bp0[nv];
1278 xx[nv*dof+2] = ibm->z_bp0[nv];
1279 }
1280 }
1281 }
1282

1285 ibm->g2[dof*ec] = ibm->G2[dof*ec]; ibm->g2[dof*ec+1] = ibm->G2[dof*ec+1]; ibm->g2[dof*ec+2] = ibm->G2[dof*ec+2];

1287
1288 ibm->g1n[dof*ec] = ibm->g1[dof*ec]; ibm->g1n[dof*ec+1] = ibm->g1[dof*ec+1]; ibm->g1n[dof*ec+2] = ibm->g1[dof*ec+2];

1299 }
1300
1301 if (ti==0) InitVel(0, 0, fem);
1302 if (ti==0) InitVel(1, 0, fem);
1303 if (ti==0) InitVel(2, 0, fem);

1307 Output(fem, 0, ibi, out_dir);

1417 // PetscFree(fem->dR_dE[i]);
1418 // }
1419 // PetscFree(fem->dR_dE);
1420
1421 if (inverse) {
1422 for (int i = 0; i < ibm->n_v; i++) {
1423 for (int j = 0; j < ibm->n_elmt; j++) {
1424 for (int k=0; k<dof; k++){
1425 PetscFree(fem->dR_dE[i][j][k]);
1426 }
1427 PetscFree(fem->dR_dE[i][j]);
1428 }
1429 PetscFree(fem->dR_dE[i]);
1430 }
1431 PetscFree(fem->dR_dE);
1432 }
1433
1434 if(bending){
1435 PetscFree(ibm->belmtsedge); PetscFree(ibm->belmts); PetscFree(ibm->edgefrontnodes);
1436 PetscFree(ibm->edgefrontnodesI);
1437 PetscFree(ibm->p4x); PetscFree(ibm->p4y); PetscFree(ibm->p4z);
1438 PetscFree(ibm->p5x); PetscFree(ibm->p5y); PetscFree(ibm->p5z);
1439 PetscFree(ibm->p6x); PetscFree(ibm->p6y); PetscFree(ibm->p6z);
1440
1441 PetscFree(ibm->p4x0); PetscFree(ibm->p4y0); PetscFree(ibm->p4z0);
1442 PetscFree(ibm->p5x0); PetscFree(ibm->p5y0); PetscFree(ibm->p5z0);
1443 PetscFree(ibm->p6x0); PetscFree(ibm->p6y0); PetscFree(ibm->p6z0);
1444 }
1445
1446 if(muscle_activation || dmplex_geom_process){
1447 ActDataDestroy(fem); // Just to check no memory leak in allocation
1448 // PetscPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, "After ActDataDestroy\n");
1449 }
1450
1451 return(0);
1452}

1518

1522

1524 /* omgc[1] = -1*(omega[dof*ec]*ibm->g1[dof*ec] + omega[dof*ec+1]*ibm->g1[dof*ec+1] + omega[dof*ec+2]*ibm->g1[dof*ec+2]); */

1526

1528

1533 /* } */
1534
1535 KEsum=0.; IEsum=0.; CEsum=0.;
1536 for (nv=0; nv<ibm->n_v; nv++) {
1537 if (ti==0) fem->CE[nv] = 0.;

1539 if (ibm->contact[nv]>0 && ibm->ibi==1) {
1540 /* xxdd[dof*nv ] = M2*xxd[nv*dof ]/8.;//fint[dof*nv ]/ibm->m[nv]++M1*(xx[nv*dof ]-xxn[nv*dof ]); */

1543

1546

1555 }
1556

1558 /* ibm->g1n[dof*ec] = ibm->g1[dof*ec]; ibm->g1n[dof*ec+1] = ibm->g1[dof*ec+1]; ibm->g1n[dof*ec+2] = ibm->g1[dof*ec+2]; */

1561 /* } */

1569 VecRestoreArray(fem->Fext, &fext);
1570
1571 FILE *f;
1572 char filen[80];
1573 PetscReal TEsum;
1574 TEsum = KEsum + IEsum;
1575
1576 sprintf(filen, "energies%2.2d.dat", ibm->ibi);
1577 f = fopen(filen, "a"); // open file
1578
1579 PetscFPrintf(PETSC_COMM_SELF, f, "%d %f %f %f %f\n", ti, IEsum, KEsum, TEsum, CEsum);
1580
